languages.text: В твердом камне — отметины от четырех когтей... хотя их глубина и острота скорее наводят на мысли о мечах или силовом оружии.
Four claw marks are visible in the hard stone... yet their depth and sharpness are more reminiscent of swords or power weapons.
languages.original_text: В твердом камне — отметины от четырех когтей... хотя их глубина и острота скорее наводят на мысли о мечах или силовом оружии.

traits.locale_text: Four claw marks are visible in the hard stone... yet their depth and sharpness are more reminiscent of swords or power weapons.
Four claw marks are visible in the hard stone... yet their depth and sharpness are more reminiscent of swords or power weapons.
Four claw marks are visible in the hard stone... yet their depth and sharpness are more reminiscent of swords or power weapons.

languages.text: 硬い石に爪痕が4つ残っている。しかしその深さや鋭さは、剣や強力な武器を思わせる。
languages.original_text: Four claw marks are visible in the hard stone... yet their depth and sharpness are more reminiscent of swords or power weapons.

traits.locale_text: 硬い石に爪痕が4つ残っている。しかしその深さや鋭さは、剣や強力な武器を思わせる。

languages.text: Sert taşın üzerinde dört pençe izi görülüyor... Ancak derinlikleri ve keskinlikleri, daha çok kılıçları veya güç silahlarını andırıyor.
languages.original_text: Four claw marks are visible in the hard stone... yet their depth and sharpness are more reminiscent of swords or power weapons.

traits.locale_text: Sert taşın üzerinde dört pençe izi görülüyor... Ancak derinlikleri ve keskinlikleri, daha çok kılıçları veya güç silahlarını andırıyor.

languages.text: Hay cuatro marcas de garras visibles en la dura piedra... pero a juzgar por su profundidad y precisión, parecen hechas por espadas o armas de energía.
languages.original_text: Four claw marks are visible in the hard stone... yet their depth and sharpness are more reminiscent of swords or power weapons.

traits.locale_text: Hay cuatro marcas de garras visibles en la dura piedra... pero a juzgar por su profundidad y precisión, parecen hechas por espadas o armas de energía.

languages.text: 坚硬的岩石上，四道爪痕清晰可见……但其深度与锐利程度，更让人联想到刀剑或能量武器。
languages.original_text: Four claw marks are visible in the hard stone... yet their depth and sharpness are more reminiscent of swords or power weapons.

traits.locale_text: 坚硬的岩石上，四道爪痕清晰可见……但其深度与锐利程度，更让人联想到刀剑或能量武器。

languages.text: La surface de pierre dure est striée de quatre griffures... des griffures dont la profondeur et la netteté évoquent plutôt une épée ou une arme énergétique.
languages.original_text: Four claw marks are visible in the hard stone... yet their depth and sharpness are more reminiscent of swords or power weapons.

traits.locale_text: La surface de pierre dure est striée de quatre griffures... des griffures dont la profondeur et la netteté évoquent plutôt une épée ou une arme énergétique.

languages.text: Vier Klauenabdrücke sind in dem harten Stein zu sehen ... wobei ihre Tiefe und Schärfe eher an Schwerter oder Energiewaffen erinnert.
languages.original_text: Four claw marks are visible in the hard stone... yet their depth and sharpness are more reminiscent of swords or power weapons.

traits.locale_text: Vier Klauenabdrücke sind in dem harten Stein zu sehen ... wobei ihre Tiefe und Schärfe eher an Schwerter oder Energiewaffen erinnert.
